medialive.channel.hlsbasicputsettings.Co.Docs: The number of seconds to wait before retrying a connection to the CDN if the connection is lost.

medialive.channel.hlsbasicputsettings.Fi.Docs: The size, in seconds, of the file cache for streaming outputs.

medialive.channel.hlsbasicputsettings.Nu.Docs: The number of retry attempts that MediaLive makes before the channel is put into an error state.

medialive.channel.hlsbasicputsettings.Re.Docs: If a streaming output fails, the number of seconds to wait until a restart is initiated. A value of 0 means never restart.
